images.alt:
Der Manga »Kin to Tetsu« von Ayaka Katayama läuft seit 3. April 2021 im »Bessatsu Shonen Magazine« von Kodansha und soll mit den kommenden 10 Band enden. Die Reihe umfasst bislang 9 Bände (49 Kapitel). Kodansha USA veröffentlicht die Reihe auf Englisch, während sie hierzulande bislang nicht auf Deutsch erhältlich ist. Eine Anime-Adaption befindet sich derzeit in Produktion, bislang ohne konkreten Starttermin.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Für Dante war das Leben auf Amigasa völlig normal, auch wenn ihn alle anderen längst für einen Sonderling hielten. Er nahm die seltsamen Blicke hin und lebte weiter in seinem eigenen Rhythmus, bis eine zufällige Begegnung mit der jungen Frau Aoi alles verändert. Plötzlich steht Dante vor Ereignissen, die er nicht länger ignorieren kann. Doch ob er wirklich handeln darf, scheint nicht allein in seiner Hand zu liegen.

Forthcoming in AEJ: Applied Economics: "Scars of War: The Legacy of WWI Deaths on Civic Capital and Combat Motivation" by Felipe Carozzi, Edward Pinchbeck, and Luca Repetto.

external.description:
(Forthcoming Article) - We study how the legacy of WWI deaths affected British communities
and the next generation of soldiers. Our instrumental-variable
estimates show that servicemen from localities that suffered heavier
losses in WWI were considerably more likely to die or win gallantry
medals in WW2. To contextualise these findings, we show that the
mortality shock increased communities’ inter-war civic capital as
demonstrated by the creation of war memorials, veterans’ associations
and charities, and increases in pro-social participation.
Our results highlight the importance of past conflicts in fostering
pro-social behaviours which, in turn, can shape the motivation of
soldiers in future wars.
external.title: Scars of War: The Legacy of WWI Deaths on Civic Capital and Combat Motivation

Today is Ona Judge Day. While the United States gears up for its 250th celebration, which inevitably includes the likes of George Washington, Ona Judge made her escape on May 21, 1796. 

The Washington household attempted her capture several times, but she was never caught.

Forever free

images.alt: In 1796, Ona Judge escaped enslavement from George Washington's household. Despite two determined attempts but the president  to forcibly recapture her, she evaded capture each time and spent the rest of her life impoverished - yet free

A marker for THE ESCAPE OF ONA JUDGE

Judge (c.1773-1848) was brought to Philadelphia in 1790 as ths enslaved house servant of First Lady Martha Washington. She escaped from the President's House on May 21, 1796 to New Hampshire with the assistance of the city's African American community. President Washington's attempts to recapture her were unsuccessful, as he met resistance from federal officials who would not comply with the Fugitive Slave Act. Judge lived as a free woman for the rest of her life.

[Excerpt from the new chapter of Cleave. There's a diagram of several characters with lines drawn between them indicating bonds]

Based on this diagram, Wren is a key character. Three separate
player characters have a relationship with them. If these bonds were
strings on a board, pulling Wren would generate the most tension,
and twisting Wren would generate the most knots. That is how you
know this is a good bond to start with.

If the bonds with Wren are generally positive, you could create a
conflict around Wren getting in danger. This will inspire your
players to act to save them. If the bonds with Wren are more
contentious, you could have them be a direct threat to the players
based on the conflicts provided with their bonds.

Hidden Pumps, Open Telnet: How Hackers Could Drain Your Local Gas Station’s Underground Tanks + Video

Introduction Automatic Tank Gauges (ATGs) are industrial control systems buried beneath every fuel station, silently monitoring fuel levels, leak detection, and tank status. Designed decades ago…

external.description: Introduction Automatic Tank Gauges (ATGs) are industrial control systems buried beneath every fuel station, silently monitoring fuel levels, leak detection, and tank status. Designed decades ago for reliability and speed—not security—many ATGs still communicate over unencrypted Telnet and are exposed on Shodan, making them a prime attack surface for critical infrastructure compromise. Learning Objectives Identify how ATGs work and why their legacy communication protocols (Telnet, custom function codes) introduce severe OT security risks.

A woman named GEMMA and a man we’ll call GEMMA’S BOYFRIEND are sat on sofa in front of TV in slouchy clothing. It is evening.  

1
GEMMA [yawning]:
I’m going to bed

2
[She gets up] 

3
[She walks up stairs]

4
[She gets into bed] 

5
[She turns the lights off and goes to sleep] 

6
GEMMA’S BOYFRIEND [his voiceover but we see his face as he is still sat on the sofa, looking stunned] 

And that’s when I knew:

Gemma was the Messiah.

7
[Cut to a preacher on a rostrum talking to a crowd of people. He is stood beneath a giant fresco of Gemma’s face bearing the words: SHE JUST WENT TO BED]

PREACHER:

She performed the miracle! 
To show us the way!

8
PREACHER:
The miracle… 
of going to bed without faffing about for absolutely ages.

9
[Cut to one panel showing a TV screen with news ticker headline: MESSIAH GOES TO BED JUST LIKE THAT, other forms of news on phones, newspapers etc with headlines SHE JUST GOT RIGHT IN THAT THING... A MIRACLE... ALIEN - OR GOD?]

10
[Cut to another preacher, this time in a massive stadium, a gospel choir singing behind him]  

PREACHER:
She did NOT have a check of the thermostat…

CROWD: 
Hell no!

11
PREACHER:
She did NOT have a three checks of the front door…

CROWD: 
Halellujah!
Whoo!

12
PREACHER:
She did NOT even have a lil’ beddy-byes doomscroll…

WHOLE CROWD:
AMEN!

[ends]

images.alt:
No acórdão publicado no dia 15 de maio, os desembargadores Miguel Kfouri Neto, Mauro Bley Pereira Junior e Rotoli De Macedo votaram a favor do recurso apresentado pela defesa de Bandura e mudaram a tipificação do crime para lesão corporal grave.

Na decisão, o relator reconheceu o argumento da defesa de Bandura, de que ele se arrependeu logo após atear fogo na mulher e, imediatamente, a ajudou. Por isso, o desembargador considerou que ele não teve a intenção de matar a ex-companheira.

A ex-companheira de Bandura sobreviveu ao ataque, mas teve 30% do corpo queimado e passou mais de 40 dias internada. Em entrevista à RPC, afiliada da TV Globo no Paraná, a vítima, que não quis ser identificada, disse que recebeu a notícia com "muita revolta e desespero".

    "Tenho medo mesmo de que ele saia, de uma possível soltura dele e de que ele concretize aquilo que ele tentou fazer. Só o fato de ele ter jogado álcool e ter ateado fogo já é uma situação que é clara de que ele tentou me matar", disse a mulher.

A RPC teve acesso ao boletim de ocorrência de violência doméstica, registrado pela mesma vítima em dezembro de 2024. No documento, ela disse aos policiais que José tinha chegado alterado em casa, estando possivelmente alcoolizado e sob o efeito de drogas. Com medo, ela acionou a polícia via 190 e José foi embora da casa.

Em consultas ao sistema da Secretaria de Segurança Pública, a tenente da PM disse que também foi possível encontrar outras passagens dele por agressão a mulheres.

    "Há inclusive algumas passagens por lesão contra a mulher, contra suas companheiras. Desde 2019, há pelo menos três registros. Ainda consta que em 2024 a vítima fez um boletim de violência doméstica contra ele", informou a tenente.
